states.name: Anya
states.title: Annihilation Girl
states.description: Don't get close to her. Don't even look at her. Her frail body and distant gaze may make her look defenseless, but if she recognizes you as an enemy, the very next moment will be your last.

states.name: Anya
states.title: Annihilation Girl
states.description: There are rumors of a young girl taking to the battlefield alongside soldiers of the Bergarian Empire, but no witness accounts. After all, none who stand against her return home alive. One foe may be pierced by countless blades, another crushed and strewn across the battlefield. All, it is whispered, die by her hands.

states.name: Anya
states.title: Annihilation Girl
states.description: There are none who know what thoughts or emotions reside behind that blank and distant stare, if any actually do. The only hint of humanity is in the way she sometimes looks up at the sky, as though remembering something or someone, and the faintest hint of sadness in her gaze.
